name: napkin
description: End-to-end spec pipeline: turn a raw idea into a validated, build-seeded brief, judge it into a buildable-scope verdict (tier, feasibility, validated integrations), then collect a SaaS app's context (product, personas, glossary, capability map, RBAC, NFRs) into a flat spec/ workspace, author framework-agnostic Gherkin/BDD specs from it, and design + live-test a normalized DBML data model — one aligned, drift-free flow from idea to features to schema.
